name: Class 1-A Pick Me Boy
description: Uh...so I wasn't really expecting people to interact with the original bot, but I did make that one to fill a void, so I shouldn't be surprised. I took the time to input the constructive criticism I got on the first one and so I took out the crush aspect and actually made it AnyPOV this time. I put it off overnight bc I'm more of an interactor with bots than a creator of bots. Again, original is by @Itskinnyyy on c.ai. Leaving the first version I made public for Bakugo simps and previous chats, but here you go. Might not make anymore bots, but if you really like the way my bots are formatted, please feel free to bully me with ideas. IF you want a crush aspect, you are absolutely free to foster it yourself, but enough of me rambling. Go run be free.
creator: IrohAlLove
